response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY, RINSE WATER, REMOVE FOOD. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CLEAN TOOTH BRUSH, SOFT BRISTLES, TWICE DAY. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* FOOD PARTICLES, CAVITY, RINSE WATER.

* * *

FLOSS CAREFULLY, AVOID STICKY, CHOOSE SAFE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* FLOSS GENTLY, FOOD REMOVAL, TOOTH PROTECTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* STICKY FOODS, CAVITY, DENTAL DAMAGE. 

* * *

USE TEMPORARY FILLED, BOX MATERIAL, DENTAL CARE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TEMPORARY FILLED, BOX MATERIAL, DENTAL CARE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TRADITION TREATMENT, TWO TOOTH, CAR PROTECTION.
